title: perilomia malvifolia
intro: Perilomia malvifolia, also known as the rock rose, is a flowering plant in the cistus genus that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Perilomia malvifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves that can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
